summary: 3-chairs full-repo audit: hunt append/layer-conflict + severed-wire + fail-open + dead/dup + structural mistakes, adversarially verified
logs: Auditing 8 dimensions across 441 scripts + 22 folders — each finding will be grep-verified before it counts.

report.headline: The render path bolts 5 forceful "CRITICAL" blocks (lighting, background, brand-text, signature) ON TOP of the LOCKED OpenClaw v3.7 canon instead of integrating them into the converter — so every render ships 2+ contradictory lighting/background directives the model must arbitrate. That is the exact append-on-top-of-authority mistake Mohamed caught, and it is the single biggest structural defect: the canon is no longer the source of truth, the trailers are.
report.by_pattern: append_conflict:10 severed_wire:9 fail_open:11 dead_dup:8 structural:6 false_claim:2 rule_bloat:2
report.structural_verdict: Two structural diseases, both about a single source of truth being violated. (1) PROMPT LAYERING: render_openclaw.py appends 5 post-canon blocks (L246/276/368/379/388) after openclaw_convert built the authoritative 15-block v3.7 prompt — chiaroscuro fights the chain's own [LIGHT & LENS], the [BACKGROUND] block forbids the exact flat color-field the albaik brief requires, and [BRAND TEXT] forbids the wordmark the converter just filled in. The canon was built to be the law; the trailers overrule it per-incident with no retirement. Fix is one-shaped: integrate every trailer into openclaw_convert as per-chain resolved placeholders so the v3.7 prompt stays the ONE authority. (2) SEVERED WIRES around the feedback loop: Mohamed's strongest signals (portal approve/reject, RABIE vision kills, founder words) are written in shapes no consumer reads — gold written as 'caption' but read as g['line'] (KeyErrors the next render), RABIE verdicts only reach the kill gate on a manual --ingest nobody runs, founder_words is 107/120 unprocessed write-only. The learning loop LOOKS wired and teaches nothing. Layered on top: a pattern of fail-open gates (try/except: pass on GATE0, kill gate, learned-lessons reader; FILLER ban re-admits banned captions) that silently degrade exactly the gates Rules #8/#12 created. Folder structure is accreted not designed (duplicate 00_/21_ prefixes, gaps at 03/17/18/19, no 00_START_HERE.md the rules mandate, an orphaned mangled client dir) — real but lower-stakes than the render+feedback rot. Three competing renderers exist (render_openclaw live, render_via_master built+tested+dead, render_image self-labeled WRONG but still feeding the judging batch) — the images Mohamed judges are NOT rendered by the path that produces, so his taste calibrates against the wrong pipeline.

top_fixes.title: 5 forceful CRITICAL blocks appended AFTER the v3.7 canon override the chain's own LIGHT/BACKGROUND/BRAND-TEXT blocks
top_fixes.fix: Stop appending. Move all 5 trailers ([BRAND TEXT] L246, [ART DIRECTION/SIGNATURE] L276/267, [PRODUCT TRUTH] L368, [LEARNED] L379, [BACKGROUND] L388) INTO openclaw_convert as per-chain resolved placeholders inside the canonical blocks (extend the existing [SCENE] weave). The chain's [LIGHT & LENS]/[REALISM & CAPTURE] is the ONE lighting authority — when a brief is present, REPLACE that block in-place (the code comment at L262 already claims it does this; it doesn't — it string-appends). Result: one lighting directive, one background directive, one brand-text rule per prompt.
top_fixes.why_it_matters: This is the exact mistake Mohamed caught and the named cause of 'generic/stock' photos. flux receives 'ONE even clinical light' AND 'chiaroscuro render EVERY shot this way' simultaneously; the [BACKGROUND] block forbids the flat saturated color-field the albaik brief requires; [BRAND TEXT] forbids the wordmark the converter just inserted. The LOCKED canon is no longer the source of truth — five trailers are.

top_fixes.title: Mohamed's portal approval seeds gold with 'caption' key but renderer hard-reads g['line'] → KeyError crashes the next client render
top_fixes.fix: At apply_rulings.py:674 write BOTH keys like gold_mint.py:123 does: 'line': entry.get('caption'), 'caption': entry.get('caption'). Also harden the reader render_client_slot.py:554 to g.get('line') or g.get('caption') and skip empties. Same fix for gold_from_ratings.py:47 (emit 'line' + a stable 'key', and write the {'gold':[...]} dict shape to clients/<h>/profile/gold.json, not the bare list it currently writes to logs/brand_gold/).
top_fixes.why_it_matters: His approve tap is the strongest few-shot signal (Rule #14). Right now it lands malformed: the entry passes the filter then KeyErrors on g['line'], crashing the whole client render — or is silently never consumed. His highest-value feedback both breaks the pipeline and teaches nothing.

top_fixes.title: RABIE vision kills never auto-reach the producer gate — bridge runs ONLY on a manual --ingest nobody calls
top_fixes.fix: Call kr.ingest_new_verdicts() at the top of get_pending_combo (kill_registry.py:119) — or at the end of rabie_judge.log_verdict() — so every fresh verdict auto-becomes a kill fingerprint the same cycle. Right now ingest_new_verdicts() is invoked nowhere except the argparse --ingest branch (grep = zero auto-callers).
top_fixes.why_it_matters: A combo RABIE/Mohamed just killed is invisible to the pre-flight gate, so the system re-spends real FAL money rendering a just-killed mistake. The taste flywheel writes verdicts that never reach the gate that's supposed to read them (Rule #6/#14 severed).

top_fixes.title: GATE0 anti-hallucination + PHASE-0 kill gate are try/except: pass / 'skipped' → fail OPEN on any error
top_fixes.fix: Make the excepts FAIL CLOSED. render_openclaw.py:60 (GATE0 product_is_real) and :71 (GATE0b pick_reference): on any exception append a refuse-reason so reasons[] is non-empty and the render blocks. produce_complete_post.py:74 (kill gate): on any exception sys.exit non-zero instead of printing 'skipped' and continuing to FAL spend. Keep the existing 'except SystemExit: raise'.
top_fixes.why_it_matters: GATE0 is labeled NON-BYPASSABLE 7 lines above the try/except: pass. A corpus-read/import/JSON error silently vanishes the gate and a hallucinated product renders with real money — the precise 'تشكن بيك' scar Rule #12 exists to stop, and a direct Rule #8 (REFUSE, DON'T WARN) violation.

top_fixes.title: FILLER ban fails OPEN — re-admits a banned bilingual-filler caption 'FLAGGED' instead of holding the slot
top_fixes.fix: When every option carries banned FILLER, route to the existing zero-caption/regen path (lines 1124-1125), not cleaned2 = final[:1]. A slot where all options are pure filler must hold/regen, never ship the least-bad banned line.
top_fixes.why_it_matters: truth_guards treats FILLER as a hard kill; this renderer path re-admits it and ships journey/unleash/conquer/رحلتك captions Mohamed banned. The two enforcement paths disagree and the renderer's path wins (Rule #8 violation).

top_fixes.title: render_openclaw exit code ignored + render_ok/complete written with no consumer → failed renders ship as clean exit-0 'success'
top_fixes.fix: Check r.returncode after subprocess.run (L108): on non-zero, exit non-zero (a gate refusal / modesty kill / SystemExit is NOT the same as 'no image'). AND wire a consumer for render_ok/complete (L160-161): the batch/orchestra step must refuse or quarantine render_ok:false before any caption is judged or staged. Today both keys have zero machine readers.
top_fixes.why_it_matters: A gate-blocked or crashed render is indistinguishable from success — the pipeline emits render_ok:false as exit-0 JSON nothing reads, so it's treated as a real produced post. backlog.json:4051 records this exact incident (falsely reported complete:true, wrong product rendered). Rule #6 + Rule #8.

top_fixes.title: Three competing renderers: render_via_master built+tested but DEAD; render_image self-labeled 'WRONG' but still feeds the judging batch
top_fixes.fix: Pick ONE canonical render path (render_openclaw, once fix #1 lands). Either wire produce_complete_post/produce_batch to call render_via_master (its reason to exist — it consumes the AD art_brief the comments promise) or delete it + its test. Port build_judging_batch.py:87 and verify_chain.py:27 OFF render_image.py (which render_via_master.py:9 itself labels 'the WRONG shortcut') onto the canonical path, then delete render_image.py.
top_fixes.why_it_matters: The judging batch — which feeds Mohamed's taste gate — renders via schnell + an improvised 'Authentic Saudi lifestyle' string, NOT the v3.7 master prompt. He calibrates his taste against images the producer will never make. Meanwhile the AD-aware renderer the comments call the consumer is orphaned.

top_fixes.title: render_client_slot reimplements truth_guards laws inline instead of calling apply_guards() — the exact frozen-copy drift the module was built to kill
top_fixes.fix: Route the client caption path through truth_guards.apply_guards(options, corpus, slot, real_hashtags) (the single exported entry point) instead of importing the raw regexes (EVENT_CLAIM/OFFER/PROMO_AR/LATIN_NAME/PERSON_AR/FILLER) and hand-rebuilding the whole kill pipeline. apply_guards is called ZERO times here despite the module existing 'so render_client_slot and the API enforce the SAME truth'.
top_fixes.why_it_matters: The comment at L953 admits the prior frozen copy 'let the career-story claim through while truth_guards had already evolved' — and the inline reimplementation re-creates that same divergence. Two truth-enforcement paths that will drift again, on a documented prior production miss.

top_fixes.title: h_post_review REJECT swallows kill_registry failure and returns a SUCCESS string — Mohamed's reject is logged as applied but feeds forward nowhere
top_fixes.fix: On a 'rejected' tap, do NOT swallow the kr.add_perf_kill exception and return the success string. Re-raise (let main()'s outer except mark it an error and SKIP the applied_rulings ledger write) so the reject retries instead of being recorded as a successful-but-phantom kill. Also persist the human_verdict to a durable side-ledger keyed by handle/product/date BEFORE the bank lookup at :655, so a rotated bank entry can't drop his verdict (the RuntimeError at :655 currently loses it permanently).
top_fixes.why_it_matters: A crashed kill is recorded as a learned rejection that blocks nothing, so the producer reproduces a post Mohamed explicitly killed. His authoritative reject — the declared ground truth for Saudi creative — silently fails to feed forward (Rule #8 + Rule #14).

top_fixes.title: The 5-CD-brain panel runs, then its lead scene_ar is unconditionally overwritten by a template string while the code prints '🧠 angle by minds'
top_fixes.fix: Change line 137 from unconditional assignment angle['scene_ar'] = f'{a.product}: {idea}' to angle.setdefault('scene_ar', ...) so the panel's lead scene survives (matching how L134-136 already setdefault brain/post_type/core). Or drop panel=True if the scene is always templated anyway — don't pay for the panel and discard its output while claiming the minds produced it.
top_fixes.why_it_matters: The most expensive part of the panel (5 CD brains fanned across GPT/Gemini/Groq) is thrown away and replaced with a mechanical 'product: idea' string, then the system claims '🧠 angle by minds' — a false claim that hides dead, paid-for work.

top_fixes.title: deadly_defaults_gate relaxation check is a whole-ledger substring match — one relaxation event unlocks ALL deadly cultural fields
top_fixes.fix: Parse ledger.jsonl as JSON lines and require an event whose type=='red_line_relaxed' AND whose field==this exact field, in the SAME event. Replace the raw `'"red_line_relaxed"' in ledger and field in ledger` substring test.
top_fixes.why_it_matters: A single legit relaxation of one field, plus the field name (e.g. mixed_gender, face_visibility) appearing anywhere else in the file for any reason, silently authorizes relaxing every other deadly cultural red-line. This is the gate guarding Saudi modesty/red-line defaults — the worst possible place for a substring fail-open.

top_fixes.title: --override-kill bypasses BOTH the kill gate AND the product-truth gate with one flag and no audit trail
top_fixes.fix: Split the flags: overriding a stale taste-kill is not the same as confirming a hallucinated product is real (Rule #12 calls GATE0 NON-BYPASSABLE). Require any override to be logged with +by and reason to a durable ledger so the bypass has a consumer/audit trail (it currently emits only a transient stderr line).
top_fixes.why_it_matters: One CLI flag turns off the anti-hallucination gate Rule #12 declares non-bypassable, letting a hallucinated product render on real FAL spend with no record that the gate was overridden or by whom.

top_fixes.title: founder_words.jsonl is a write-only organ — 107/120 notes unprocessed, no consumer feeds his words into generation
top_fixes.fix: Build the consumer Rule #6 demands: a processor that turns each processed:false founder note into a crystallize-draft card (or law candidate) and flips processed:true, and/or injects founder-voice exemplars into render_client_slot/cd_panel. Same for the unread caption_bank human_verdict annotation (apply_rulings.py:656) — wire a reader or drop the field.
top_fixes.why_it_matters: Mohamed's verbatim words are gold (the whole point of the parity backfill) but the only 'reader' is an audit that checks the writer ran. 107 of 120 notes sit dead. It looks like learning and teaches nothing.

top_fixes.title: Folder structure is accreted not designed: duplicate 00_/21_ prefixes, no mandated 00_START_HERE.md, orphaned mangled client dir
top_fixes.fix: (a) Pick ONE front door — merge 00_system into 00_start_here and create the single 00_START_HERE.md the operating rules mandate (none exists). (b) Renumber one of the duplicate 21_ folders (21_strategy_frameworks → an open slot 17/18/19) and update the ~4 path literals (render_client_slot.py:270 etc.). (c) Get DELETE APPROVED and remove the orphaned clients/lnasserjewelry (mangled dup of alnasserjewelry, half-built profile, will be caught by any clients/* glob). (d) Regenerate or date-stamp the stale 00_system corpus numbers (3,816 obs / 61 brands presented as current ✅ truth while live runs off 9 clients/ dirs).
top_fixes.why_it_matters: The 2-hop / one-address rule (CLAUDE.md) is structurally broken: the front door is split, numbers collide, and known-bad dirs persist. The orphan client dir will produce against stale/empty organs; the stale doc numbers are read as current truth.

top_fixes.title: Six per-incident CRITICAL blocks piled on the LOCKED canon with no retirement; 41 orphan one-shot scripts in scripts/
top_fixes.fix: After fix #1 consolidates the trailers into the converter, institute retirement discipline: each per-case append (June21 brand-text, June23 product-truth, June24 background, June29 art-direction) must live as a converter placeholder, not an accreted post-canon block. Separately, move dated migration/one-shot orphans (sweep_v6, apply_deep_diagnosis, backfill_attribution_jun12, _b291_migrate, rescue_buried_captions, render_slots_batch) to an archive/ subfolder (DELETE-APPROVED), and repoint the make_sure.py:276 pgrep that green-lights on render_slots_batch — a process nothing launches (fail-open health check).
top_fixes.why_it_matters: Per-case rules pile up with no consolidation, flattening the canon's 88-chain variance toward one look. 41 of 441 scripts have zero cross-references, making the live pipeline indistinguishable from dead code, and a health check 'passes' by watching a process that can never run.
